title: coelorachis balansae
intro: Coelorachis balansae is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae, native to tropical Asia and the Pacific Islands. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant is also known to have health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Coelorachis balansae, such as infusions and decoctions, are commonly used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
